codeReview.summary: Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit 662b05e. The implementation correctly removes the top failed-screen BackLink, preserves inline retry/back actions, and adds regression tests that specifically pin VAL-RTS-003 behavior. No blocking or non-blocking defects were found in the reviewed diff.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission AGENTS milestone summary for rotate-share is outdated and still lists "Confirm & Apply, Success, Error", which conflicts with the active rotate-share contract flow naming and can mislead workers.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: AGENTS.md:17 lists "rotate-share — Enter Rotate Package, Confirm & Apply, Success, Error"; validation-contract.md VAL-RTS-001..006 defines /rotate-share, /rotate-share/applying, /rotate-share/failed, /rotate-share/updated with no separate confirm screen.

summary: PASS: rotate-share-fidelity commit 662b05e satisfies the intended VAL-RTS-003 parity fix (no top BackLink on failed screen) and includes focused tests preventing regression. One shared-state documentation drift was noted in mission AGENTS milestone wording.
